untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of information asymmetry, material information revelation timing (earnings calls, regulatory filings), Google Trends spike detection, and news aggregator sentiment analysis. These are external data sources and NLP/sentiment indicators not available in the allowed indicator set. The core volume and price direction components are translatable, but the critical information timing and asymmetry detection cannot be implemented with OHLCV indicators alone.
translation_notes: Translated directional price bias (>0.5 std devs) to close crossing sma_20. Volume threshold (>50th percentile of 20-day rolling average) mapped to vol_ratio_20 >= 1.0 (50th percentile normalized). Exit on volume exhaustion mapped to vol_ratio_20 drop below 0.75. Time stop of 72 hours converted to hold_days_max of 3. Information decay requirement and public disclosure detection cannot be implemented without external event/sentiment data sources.
